across.clue: To make changes to a document law agreement etc especially in order to improve it.

to state firmly that something is true.
to publicly support a particular policy or way of doing things
a feeling of having no interest in or enthusiasm about anything or of not being willing to make any effort to change things.

ordinary and not interesting or exciting especially because it happens too regularly
